summary: Iteration 14 testing completed - Agent Teams, Lead Scoring, and A/B Testing features. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed 1 bug in agent_teams.py where custom team creation failed due to missing agent IDs.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/backend/routes/agent_teams.py line 115-120: Custom team creation was failing because agents provided without IDs caused KeyError when generating handoff rules. Added code to assign UUIDs to agents without IDs.
Lead scoring config endpoint returns user's stored config which may be incomplete if only some factors were updated. Consider merging with defaults for complete config.
A/B testing uses Z-score for statistical significance with 95% confidence threshold - working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test teams and A/B tests created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up at end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested: 1) Agent Teams with parallel execution using asyncio.gather, 2) Lead Scoring with 6 customizable factors and AI learning from outcomes, 3) A/B Testing with statistical significance calculation (Z-score). All 15 requested endpoints working correctly.

GET /api/agent-teams/templates.details: Returns 3 team templates (outbound-team, inbound-team, nurture-team) with agents and descriptions

POST /api/agent-teams.details: Creates custom team with auto-generated agent IDs and handoff rules. BUG FIXED: Was failing when agents didn't have IDs

POST /{team_id}/execute-parallel.details: Executes all team agents in parallel using asyncio.gather, returns executionId and results per agent

GET /analytics/summary.details: Returns totalTeams, activeTeams, totalExecutions, completedExecutions, successRate, topTeams

GET /api/lead-scoring/config.details: Returns user's scoring configuration with factors and weights

POST /api/lead-scoring/score.details: Calculates prospect score (0-100) with breakdown by factor, priority (hot/warm/nurture/cold), and recommendation

PUT /api/lead-scoring/config/factor/{nam.details: Updates individual factor weight (0-100), validates factor name and weight range

GET /api/lead-scoring/distribution.details: Returns score distribution by category (hot/warm/nurture/cold/unscored) with counts and percentages

POST /api/lead-scoring/learn.details: Records deal outcome (won/lost/disqualified) for AI learning, updates prospect status

POST /api/ab-testing/tests.details: Creates A/B test with variants, test type, metrics, and targeting options

POST /tests/{id}/start.details: Starts test and splits prospects between variants based on splitRatio

POST /tests/{id}/record-event.details: Records events (sent/open/click/reply/conversion) for variants, auto-calculates rates

POST /tests/{id}/complete.details: Determines winner using Z-score statistical significance, returns confidence level

POST /api/ab-testing/suggest-test.details: Returns AI suggestions for A/B tests based on goal (improve_open_rates/replies/conversions/all)

GET /api/ab-testing/analytics/summary.details: Returns totalTests, completedTests, runningTests, testsWithWinner, winRate, avgImprovement, byType

bugs_fixed.issue: KeyError when creating custom team with agents that don't have IDs
bugs_fixed.fix: Added code to assign UUIDs to agents without IDs before generating handoff rules

mocked_apis.agent_task_execution: Agent tasks use simulated execution - no real external API calls
mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
